title: Funny Join/Leave Messages
description: FunnyJoinLeaveMessages is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that replaces boring vanilla join and leave messages with funny, colorful, and fully customizable messages.
body:
### 🎉 FunnyJoinLeaveMessages
Tired of boring vanilla join and leave messages?

This lightweight, standalone plugin replaces default join and leave messages with colorful, customizable, and hilarious messages that make every login and logout memorable.

### ✨ Features
- 🎨 Customizable Messages

Add as many join and leave messages as you like — all fully color-code compatible (&c, &a, etc).
- 🔄 Randomized Selection

Every time a player joins or leaves, a random message from your list is displayed.
- ⚙️ Simple Commands

/fjlm add <join|leave> <message> → Add a new message

/fjlm remove <join|leave> <message> → Remove an existing one

Includes full tab completion for message types and existing lines.

- 👤 Dynamic Placeholders

{player} → Player name

{online} → Number of players currently online

### 🪄 Commands & Permissions
All commands require permission fjlm.manage

```
/fjlm add <join/leave> <message>        Add a message to config
/fjlm remove <join/leave> <message>     Remove a message from config
```
You can use Minecraft color codes like &a, &b, &6, etc.

Messages are automatically saved — no reload needed.
